tickets.name: Upper Deck Bound
tickets.note: Olson is crushing contact at an elite rate (63% hard-hit) and has monster raw power (.273 ISO), Stewart gets a yard playing like a launchpad tonight, and Burger is launching rockets (56% hard-hit).

tickets.name: Off the Scoreboard
tickets.note: Olson is mashing the ball (63% hard-hit) and carries game-changing power (.273 ISO), Happ has rare thump (.243 ISO), and Eldridge is hitting frozen ropes (62% hard-hit).

tickets.name: To the Heavens
tickets.note: Pederson is making elite contact (59% hard-hit) and is lifting everything (21°), Crow-Armstrong puts the ball in the air on a homer plane (21°), and Riley is stinging it on a rope (57% hard-hit).

tickets.name: Liftoff Sequence
tickets.note: Pederson is leaving scorch marks (59% hard-hit) and puts air under the ball (21°), Okamoto is teeing off (60% hard-hit), and Sanchez has textbook lift (18°).

tickets.name: Second Stage
tickets.note: Alonso has the wind howling out behind him and is hitting bullets (58% hard-hit), Carroll carries elite slug (.271 ISO), and Callihan is making thunderous contact (71% hard-hit).

tickets.name: Leaving the Atmosphere
tickets.note: Alonso has the jet stream pushing toward the seats and is squaring up everything (58% hard-hit), Marte is crushing the baseball (57% hard-hit), and Carrigg swings one of the biggest sticks on the board (100/100 power).

tickets.name: The Potluck
tickets.note: Devers is denting outfield walls (61% hard-hit) and sits in the ideal launch angle (20°), Baldwin is hitting absolute lasers (58% hard-hit), Suzuki gets under it just right (21°), and Langford brings well-above-average pop (79/100 power).

tickets.name: Last Train Home
tickets.note: Byron Buxton is scorching the ball (61% hard-hit), brings 30-homer pop (.315 ISO), finds the home-run trajectory (19°), and brings light-tower raw power (100/100).

tickets.name: High Noon
tickets.note: Ben Rice swings with the wind at his back, is rocketing line drives (62% hard-hit), hits for serious power (.322 ISO), and swings a heavy stick (83/100 power).

tickets.name: In the Black
tickets.note: Spencer Torkelson is barreling everything in sight (57% hard-hit), has the swing plane dialed for liftoff (21°), and has legit pop behind it (.202 ISO).

tickets.name: The Float
tickets.note: Juan Soto is punishing the baseball (60% hard-hit), brings middle-of-the-order slug (.282 ISO), and has real over-the-fence pop (64/100).

tickets.name: Walking-Around Money
tickets.note: Max Muncy plays in a wind tunnel pointed at the seats, is tattooing the baseball (55% hard-hit), and brings elite raw pop (.252 ISO).

tickets.name: The Cookie Jar
tickets.note: Dillon Dingler is hammering the ball (54% hard-hit), brings the loudest pop on the ticket (.263 ISO), and launches it at the right angle (17°).

tickets.name: Pocket Money
tickets.note: Kerry Carpenter is lighting up the radar gun (53% hard-hit), swings with home-run loft (20°), and packs a big-league power grade (78/100).

tickets.name: The Allowance
tickets.note: Rhys Hoskins is striking it clean and hard (54% hard-hit), swings with natural lift (22°), has the pop to go deep (88/100 power), and our projection sits at 85.

tickets.name: Cashing Out
tickets.note: Riley Greene is generating elite exit velo (55% hard-hit), has real over-the-fence pop (53/100), the bat speed looks back, and the model has him at 86 for the night.

tickets.name: The Slow Grind
tickets.note: Kevin McGonigle stays in the launch zone (22°), packs respectable power (51/100 grade), lands at 85 in our model, and due to run into one.

tickets.name: Steady Drip
tickets.note: Davis Schneider is squaring up premium contact (52% hard-hit), swings on a clean uppercut (21°), swings with usable power (69/100), and on a clear upswing.

tickets.name: Singles Add Up
tickets.note: Michael Busch lives in the launch window (18°), is making quality contact (52% hard-hit), has the pop to go deep (70/100 power), and the swing's trending up.

tickets.name: Chip Stack
tickets.note: Casey Schmitt hits it on the perfect plane (21°), packs above-average pop (.223 ISO), is putting a charge into it (49% hard-hit), and carries a solid power grade (55/100).

tickets.name: The Vig Killer
tickets.note: Matt Chapman is barreling balls at will (55% hard-hit), elevates with ease (22°), has enough pop to clear it (64/100 power), and the model still lands him at 83.

tickets.name: Direct Deposit
tickets.note: Kyle Higashioka has a swing built for the seats (19°), is making solid contact (52% hard-hit), brings average-plus thump (53/100), and he's squaring more up lately.

tickets.name: Rainy Day Fund
tickets.note: Taylor Ward gets a park that's launching everything tonight, keeps the ball in the air (20°), and plays a touch under the power tier (45/100).
